quality.rationale: 考查黎曼曲率在二维切平面上的投影不变性，结合度规对称性与坐标无关性证明，逻辑完整且契合微分几何基础背景。

origin.question:
Problem 9.23. Let $\mathbf{A}$ and $\mathbf{B}$ be two linearly independent vectors tangent at a point to a two-dimensional surface, in a space of dimension $\geq 2$ . The Riemannian curvature of the 2-surface at that point is defined as
$$
K = \frac {R_{\alpha \gamma \beta \delta} A^{\alpha} A^{\beta} B^{\gamma} B^{\delta}}{\left(g_{\alpha \beta} g_{\gamma \delta} - g_{\alpha \delta} g_{\beta \gamma}\right) A^{\alpha} A^{\beta} B^{\gamma} B^{\delta}}.
$$
Show that $\mathbf{K}$ is unchanged if $\mathbf{A}$ and $\mathbf{B}$ are replaced by linear combinations of $\mathbf{A}$ and $\mathbf{B}$ .
origin.solution:
Solution 9.23. Choose a coordinate system geared to the surface. Let $\mathbf{x}^1, \mathbf{x}^2$ vary, and $\mathbf{x}^3, \mathbf{x}^4$ be constant on the surface. The only contravariant components of $\mathbf{A}$ and $\mathbf{B}$ are then the 1 and 2 components. We are interested then only in the Riemann components with indices 1 and 2, but there is only one such independent component, $\mathbb{R}_{1212}$ . The nonvanishing Riemann components of this type are related by symmetries which can be expressed as
$$
R_{i j k 1} \propto (g_{i k} g_{i 1} - g_{i 1} g_{j k}) \quad i, j, k, 1 = 1, 2.
$$
It follows immediately that in this coordinate system $\mathbf{K}$ is independent of $\mathbf{A}$ and $\mathbf{B}$ . Since $\mathbf{K}$ is clearly coordinate independent the desired result is proved.
